title: HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Health-related social needs (HRSN) are basic needs that affect a person's health. These benefits help members who qualify with basic needs, including rent payment assistance and utility payment assistance, tenant support, and storage fees. Members can only receive HRSN housing services once per lifetime. 500 Summer Street NE E-49 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: OHP members who meet all of the following: -Age 65 or older, children age 0-5, pregnant or gave birth in the past 12 months, OR anyone with a qualifying health condition -Have a household income 30% or less of the average yearly income where the applicant lives -Need support staying in housing -Have a lease or written rental agreement -Lack resources to prevent homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (888) 834-4304 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (888) 834-4304 OHP Open Card members [email protected] Intake (800) 273-0557 Members not in a CCO INTAKE PROCEDURE: CCO members: Call the CCO or visit website for more information Open card members: Call, email, or visit website for more information Clients not in a CCO: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Medicaid ID number, Rental/lease agreement, or utility bill LANGUAGES: Arabic, Chinese, English, Spanish, Russian, Vietnamese, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Manufactured/Mobile Home Lot Fee Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Rent Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - OHA OMBUDS PROGRAM FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP IN-PERSON APPLICATION ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN CARE COORDINATION NURSE ADVICE LINE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OHP CLIENT SERVICES UNIT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON HEALTH PLAN SPECIALTY MEDICINE - OREGON VETERAN DENTAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
